title: Open Salesforce Object Links in Same Tab
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want clicking on a Salesforce object to navigate in the same tab, so that I can use the browser back button for natural navigation.
description: Change Salesforce object links to open in the same browser tab instead of a new window. User feedback from two beta testers indicated that opening new tabs was disruptive. Same-tab navigation also facilitates future in-app user guides.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking a Salesforce object link opens in the same tab
Browser back button returns the user to the previous page
No new browser tabs or windows are opened when clicking object links
ux_changes: Salesforce object links now open in the same tab instead of a new window, enabling standard back-button navigation.
implementation_notes: Removed target='_blank' from object link elements. Change driven by user feedback from two beta testers.
